title.en: Ye Tian directly took out a lot of Divine Sands...

content.en:
"So many Divine Sands, enough for me to cultivate for a long time!"

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanqi Realm Ruins Stone Pagoda, and then began to retreat.

"Try the effect of the Golden Sands!"

Ye Tian directly took out a lot of Divine Sands and slowly refined them.

Rumble!!!

Streams of pure energy poured into Ye Tian's body from the Divine Sands, helping him quickly refine his whole body.

"What a powerful effect!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Compared to the effect of the Divine Sands, the Immeasurable Blood Gold Stone is too ordinary.

Of course, it was also he who had refined too much of the Immeasurable Blood Stone, which caused the Infinite Blood Stone to have a worse and worse effect on him, which was equivalent to developing patience.

And it was the first time for him to use the Divine Sands to refine his whole body, and the effect was naturally very good.

At this refining speed, he would definitely be able to complete the ninth full-body tempering in a long time.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, the first year of the sixty million realms passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally completed the ninth full-body tempering.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body continued to transform, the strength of his flesh and blood body skyrocketed, and his aura became more and more powerful.

After a long time, the metamorphosis was complete.

At this moment, Ye Tian was already a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that had been tempered for the ninth time of his whole body.

At this time, he could go to the fifth stage of the high-level immeasurable life form realm.

However, he was not satisfied with the ninth full-body tempering, he also wanted to impact the tenth full-body tempering and the eleventh full-body tempering.

According to the information learned by the Huanyu Alliance, in the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform stage, the number of full-body tempering can reach up to thirteen, which is also the highest number of full-body tempering at present.

And if Ye Tian wants to complete the whole body refining thirteen times, he will need more resources.

If he relied on himself to collect it slowly, it would take endless years, so he would have to rely on the platform of the Universal Alliance.

After breaking through in strength, Ye Tian once again sparred with Xuanqi Jiashi, although he was still not an opponent, at least he would not be hit hard by a blow.

With his current strength, he can completely fight with Xuanqi armor for a while.

"My current strength should be about the same as that of Jiuyang Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian estimated.

It's a little bit close, but it's not much.

If he completes a full-body tempering again, reaching the level of ten full-body tempering, his strength will definitely be no less than that of Xuanqi Jiashi.

If the immeasurable blood is raised to a super-high quality, the strength is afraid that it will surpass the combat power of the Xuanqi armor.

In the following days, Ye Tian was still refining his whole body and practicing quietly.

......

Universal Alliance.

Inside a plane.

A group of fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms are conducting a small trade fair, and the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that can be invited here are the lowest and the top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and their strength is very powerful.

"Everyone, I want to collect some Origin Gold Crystals, or Ruin Gold, and there is no limit!"

A Great Ancestor spoke.

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, Origin Golden Crystal, this treasure is too rare, almost all of them are in the hands of the Heavenly Ancestors, we don't have any!" said another Great Ancestor.

The other Great Ancestors also spoke.

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, I don't have any Origin Gold Crystal in my hand, as for the ruin gold, there is a little, but the quantity is very small, only a hundred or so!"

"I only have more than a hundred grains of ruin gold!"

"I don't have anything, I can't trade with you without phosphorus Great Ancestor!"

Seeing this, the phosphorus-free Great Ancestor said: "Everyone, even if there is only one grain of ruin gold, please trade it to me!"

"No problem!"

A great ancestor took the lead in trading with a phosphorus-free great ancestor.

Of course, even if it's a trade, they have to exchange something good.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor is very rich, after all, his strength is very strong, so naturally there are many ways to get good resources.

In a short period of time, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor had traded more than 3,000 ruin gold grains from these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

However, he didn't even get a piece of Origin Gold Crystal, it was true that they really didn't have any Origin Gold Crystal.

At this time, Jin Heng Ancestor asked, "Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, you want to collect so much ruin gold, and you still want to trade the Origin Gold Crystal, could it be that you got an Infinite Realm Armor?"

Swish!

The other Great Ancestors also looked at the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, and they all had such speculations, so they wanted to learn about it from the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"That's right!"

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor nodded and said, "I did get an Infinite Realm Armor, if I can trade three Origin Gold Crystals, or a large amount of ruin gold, I can urge this Infinite Realm Armorer." An Infinite Realm Armor Warrior can be called the fifth stage invincible, and with it, my strength will be greatly improved!"

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, congratulations!"

"Congratulations to the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor for obtaining the Infinite Realm Armor!"

"I really envy you Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, you can even get such a good thing as the Infinite Realm Armor!"

A group of Great Ancestors were envious, of course, there were also those who were jealous, after all, almost all the Infinite Realm Armor Warriors were in the hands of the Heavenly Ancestors, and it was almost impossible to obtain a Infinite Realm Armor Warrior.

If you have dozens of Infinite Realm Armor Warriors and combine them into a battle array, you can surround and kill an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor.

They didn't ask the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor about the origin of the Infinite Realm Armor, and it was impossible for the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor to reveal it.

At this time, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor asked again, "Fellow Ancestors, do you know who still has a large amount of Ruin Gold or Origin Gold Crystal on their bodies?"

The great ancestors present were all silent, after all, whoever had the ruin gold on him could not reveal it!

Suddenly.

Jin Heng Ancestor said: "Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, I do know that a Great Ancestor has ruins of gold on him, but I don't know how much there is." Moreover, he is also the Great Ancestor of our Universal Alliance, you can contact him. "

"Who is it?"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor asked.

"Endless Ancestor!"

Jin Hengzu said.

......

"Has the Great Ancestor contacted me?"

Ye Tian took out the lander of the Huanyu Alliance and entered the space-time network of the Huanyu Alliance, only to know that it was a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform to contact him.

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, it's him!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although there were many fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Cosmos Alliance, he couldn't recognize them all, but he still had some understanding of some of the top ancestors of the Cosmos Alliance, and he had done his homework before.

For example, this phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, his strength is already at the limit of the fifth stage, and in the entire Huanyu Alliance, his strength can be ranked among the top twenty.

A fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Jiuyang Great Ancestor was not qualified to compare with the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor at all, and even if it was a Xuanqi Armor, it was far from being the opponent of the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

The Universal Alliance and many other forces have divided the combat power of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage into the following grades.

Ordinary fifth-stage combat power!

Powerful Fifth Stage Combat Power!

Top Stage 5 Combat Power!

Peak Fifth Stage Combat Power!

Invincible fifth stage combat power!

and the fifth-stage combat power of the Boundary Breaking Rank that can compete with the weaker Heavenly Ancestors!

According to the division, the phosphorus-free Great Ancestor belongs to the peak fifth stage of combat power.
